evals.name: find_angle_for_article
evals.prompt: 我想写一篇关于 AI 编程工具的文章，帮我找一个独特的角度
assertions: Response should guide the user through the angle-finding process
Response should mention cross-domain information gathering
Response should avoid simple information aggregation

evals.name: article_structure
evals.prompt: 帮我设计一篇公众号文章的结构，主题是远程工作的利与弊
assertions: Response should provide a clear article structure
Response should consider article rhythm and pacing
Response should include opening hook and closing
